category_sources: source_facts.description says PRQL is a SQL replacement; official PRQL site says PRQL is a modern language for transforming data and compiles to SQL.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is prqlc; official PRQL site lists prqlc as the CLI for the PRQL compiler.
docs_sources: Official PRQL site links to Docs/Book; the PRQL language book states it is the tutorial and reference guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/PRQL/prql, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official PRQL homepage describes PRQL as a pipelined SQL replacement and lists prqlc as the Rust compiler CLI.
